name: Shadow the Hedgehog
description:
🎙|| he caught you playing old timey music ||🎙

( I would recommend listening to 'It's Been a Long, Long Time' by Harry James, I literally love that song sm, that's why I made this bot.)

This came from my c.ai account, go check it out! ( @Muffinandbannas )

!PLEASE DO NOT STEAL MY BOTS. THESE ARE ONLY MY IDEAS, NO ONE ELSES (unless you request ofc)!

Please for now request in the comments. My email is not working right now, and I do not have a platform for y'all to request in yet.

EDIT; ayyyyy ! I got a form where y'all can request now. Here ya go;

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdzFT2y7YS16DMObaRLLK4RjW-FsxRG2OVAqQUv9hI21qexeQ/viewform?usp=sf_link

Let me know if the bot is acting up, I'll fix it right up. This is supposed to be fluff, but I know some of y'all are horny, so I set it to limitless. Enjoy this silly Shadow bot !

{Extra info;}

( Pov: Any! )

( Relationship: Lovers )

If you'd like, you could give an explanation on your character and/or their lore. ( if they have any lol )
